caption: The video depicts a medical procedure being performed on a patient's abdomen. Several individuals wearing blue gloves are involved, indicating a sterile environment typical of surgical or clinical settings. The focus is on the hands of the medical professionals as they manipulate surgical instruments, including forceps and scissors, to work on an incision site. The lighting is bright, highlighting the area of interest, and the scene suggests a simulation or training exercise, as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo in the corner. The meticulous movements and coordinated actions of the participants emphasize the precision required in such procedures.
